contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Restore prod DApp registration + deploy SA-path fix + topology docs
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/240
  
  Details:
  Follow-on to dao_protocol#51 / truesight_autopilot#60. Discovered the live DApp email-registration outage: post-2026-05-28 NELANCO cutover, the dao submit endpoint is proxied to the standalone dao_protocol_nelanco host (172.31.23.207:8010), which had been deployed WITHOUT any Google service-account keys, so every email-registration signature write failed with FileNotFoundError. Remediation deployed + verified: (1) provisioned the 3 SA keys to /home/ubuntu/dao_protocol/config/google (0600), set DAO_PROTOCOL_GOOGLE_CREDS_DIR, pulled PR51, restarted truesight-dao-protocol.service; confirmed edgar-dapp-listener SA authenticates to Google and all 3 paths resolve, and the email-registration code path now runs to completion instead of erroring. (2) Deployed PR51+PR60 to the autopilot EC2 (reinstalled truesight-dao-client, pulled prompt fix, restarted) - SA now resolves via the /opt/truesight_autopilot/config/google built-in probe dir; diagnostic rule live. (3) Refreshed NOTES_sentiment_importer.md (PR240) to the live NELANCO topology (seni_ror / seni_sk_nelanco / dao_protocol_nelanco), documented route delegation and the creds gotcha.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
